Read-only CLI over build/spec-registry/registry.json (specs/002-registry-consumer-mvp)

Usage: registry-consumer [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

Commands:
  list           List features (human-readable table), sorted by id
  show           Print one feature record as JSON
  status-report  Print lifecycle/status summary report
  help           Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
      --registry-path <PATH>  Path to registry.json (default: build/spec-registry/registry.json relative to cwd)
      --allow-invalid         Allow reading when validation.passed is false (diagnostics only)
  -h, --help                  Print help
  -V, --version               Print version
